THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY, RHONDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 JONES ST. #407, S.F. VACATES BY 9/30, $500 WIL BE KEPT BY PLTF & $507 WILL BE RETURNED TO DEFT. DEFT. TO VACATE AND SURRENDER PREMISES TO PLTF. NO LATER THAN MIDNIGHT 9/30, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH..
